channel.title: Entropy on MuS
channel.description: Recent content in Entropy on MuS

item.title: Time Knot Part I: Getting a Whiteboard Eraser Thrown by an Old Professor
item.description: Notes on the limits of the linear model in understanding the intersection of two opposing arrows of time.

item.title: The Entropy of Identity
item.description: In a cemetery in Vienna, an equation about entropy is carved onto Ludwig Boltzmann’s tombstone. If our identity is a system, this equation explains why we need the space to be ‘messy’ in order to keep evolving.
